user_goal: B021 cloud deploy & auth 已签收（commit a02fb69，5 fix-rounds 后 PASS），workbench live at https://trade.guangai.ai 含 OAuth + SQLite + 系统化 deploy + 备份 + 可观测。按 ADR + B022 spec（已 2026-05-17 更新含 cloud + auth + Repository adaptation 段）起 B022 Research Workbench Phase 1。本批次 14 features 在 B020+B021 基础设施之上建 7 read-mostly 业务页 + 最小必要 write：(F001) shadcn/ui init + 金融预配 (Inter + JetBrains Mono + #00c853/#ff3b30 P&L 色 + Zinc dark + tabular-nums) + 装 AG Grid Community + lightweight-charts + ECharts；(F002) OpenAPI ↔ TS pipeline extend 覆盖 7 endpoint schemas；(F003) Shell layout extend：TopBar + SideNav + ThemeProvider（B021 已有 Footer + middleware + /(protected)/ 不重写）；(F004) Chart 组件库 wrappers（5 个：Equity/Drawdown/Heatmap/Pie/Bar）+ /dev/charts 页；(F005) AG Grid DataTable wrapper + CSV export + 5 reusable 列定义；(F006-F012) 7 个 vertical slice 页（Home / Strategies / Backtest with ResizablePanel 单页 split / Reports markdown 渲 / Recommendations 出 ticket 不下单 / Snapshots refresh SSE / Backlog CRUD + git auto-commit）；(F013) workbench README + 7 页截图 + architecture 文档 + branch protection 指引；(F014) Codex L1 (CI) + L2 真 VM 10 项验收 + signoff。**禁止引入：** 任何执行 UI / 订单 / 多用户 / 注册 / broker SDK / paper or live URL / Cloud SQL / Postgres（B023 + 永久 non-MVP）。所有 fetch 用 same-origin /api/* 路径（framework v0.9.24 #3）；所有 API endpoint 在 require_authenticated_user 后；读 SQLite via Repository（B021 F002 已有）非直读文件。F001-F013 generator，F014 codex。预估 5-6 周。
evaluator_feedback: B022 F014 reverification 2026-05-18 after fixing-round 3: FAIL. Local round-3 backend regression is green (`test_db_degrade.py` + `test_backlog_prod_config.py` + `test_error_buffer.py` + `test_snapshots.py`: 14 passed; ruff + mypy pass). Authenticated production session is healthy and `/api/health.version` matches local HEAD `6c0d282420d72339d31f2918fefe2348ff062bfa`. Round-3 recovered the Snapshots list read path (`GET /api/snapshots` -> `200 {"snapshots":[]}`) and the Recommendations page export UI flow now succeeds end-to-end, writing `/var/lib/workbench/runs/2026-05-18/order-ticket-2026-05-18.md`. Remaining blockers are now narrowed to concrete production schema gaps exposed by the new `/api/debug/recent-errors` endpoint: (1) `POST /api/backlog` still fails with `OperationalError: no such table: backlog_entry`; (2) `/api/snapshots/refresh` still ends in an error modal with `OperationalError: no such table: snapshot_meta`. Report: docs/test-reports/B022-workbench-phase1-reverification-round3-2026-05-18.md.
generator_handoff:
**2026-05-18 fixing-round 3 handoff (Codex retest target):** Round-3 addresses the 2 remaining blockers from docs/test-reports/B022-workbench-phase1-reverification-2026-05-18.md after round-2 deploy (Codex confirmed 3 of 4 round-2 targets recovered: /api/dashboard 200, /api/recommendations/current 200, /api/backlog GET 200, /api/recommendations/export-ticket 200 with disclaimer; /api/snapshots GET still 500 and /api/backlog POST still 500). Three fixes ship together: (a) **services/snapshots.list_snapshots** got the same defensive degrade pattern the other 3 services already had (try/SQLAlchemyError → log via workbench.snapshots `event=snapshots_list_db_error` + session.rollback + return SnapshotListResponse(snapshots=[])). This was just a miss in round-2 — the SSE fix shipped but the LIST handler wasn't touched. (b) **routes/backlog._default_config** is now prod-aware. The actual root cause for /api/backlog POST 500: the prod backend runs from an installed wheel under /srv/workbench/.../site-packages, so Path(__file__).parents[4] resolves somewhere unrelated to any git working tree. The dev-time `git add backlog.json && git commit` chain crashes before reaching the route handler's catch. Round-3 detects production via `PROD_RELEASE_CURRENT.exists()` (= /srv/workbench/current) and falls back to PROD_BACKLOG_DIR = /var/lib/workbench/backlog (writable via the systemd unit's ReadWritePaths grant) + a `_noop_git_runner` that logs the skip and returns. **Documented limitation**: prod backlog mutations don't appear in the repo's git history; durability comes from the SQLite row + the daily backup. B023 owns proper auditable persistence. (c) **services/backlog.create/update/delete_backlog** now log per-phase (db_upsert_commit / json_dump / git_commit) via _log_phase_failure helper before re-raising. Even if a new failure mode appears, journalctl (or the new error buffer) will tag exactly which phase blew up + the exception class. (d) **New /api/debug/recent-errors endpoint** + observability/error_buffer.py — auth-gated route returning the last 50 unhandled-exception records (ts/method/path/exception_type/exception_message) from a bounded in-memory deque. The global exception handler now appends to this buffer in addition to logging to workbench.unhandled. This is the workaround for Codex having no SSH access to journalctl: now Codex can `curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/debug/recent-errors` with its authed session to see exactly what exceptions the 4 round-2 fixes (and any new failure) are catching. Regression tests: test_db_degrade.py +1 (snapshots), new test_backlog_prod_config.py (3 tests covering prod / dev / no-op runner), new test_error_buffer.py (3 tests covering record round-trip / cap / global handler integration via TestClient). **Local verify**: backend pytest 135 + 2 skipped (128→135) / ruff / mypy 93 source files clean; frontend lint / tsc / vitest 79 clean; api.ts regenerated for the new debug endpoint. **What Codex needs to do**: after this push deploys, immediately curl /api/debug/recent-errors (with the existing authed session) to see the captured cause records for /api/snapshots and /api/backlog POST. The degrade for /api/snapshots LIST should now return 200 + empty list. For /api/backlog POST, expect either 200+201 (the prod fallback path persists JSON to /var/lib/workbench/backlog/backlog.json and skips git) or a per-phase tagged exception in the buffer telling us which step still fails (e.g. db_upsert_commit if migrations missed, or json_dump if /var/lib/workbench/backlog isn't writable).

--- prior fixing-round 2 handoff below ---

**2026-05-18 fixing-round 2 handoff (Codex retest target):** Round-2 addresses the 4 new production blockers Codex L2 surfaced after round-1 deploy went live (OAuth session blocker F014-1 is resolved; the 4 follow-on 500s on /api/dashboard, /api/recommendations/current, /api/snapshots/refresh, /api/backlog are this round's target). Three orthogonal fixes shipped together: (a) **Snapshots SSE** definite root cause fix — FastAPI's sync `get_session` generator dep was tearing down the session BEFORE `StreamingResponse(refresh_event_stream(session))` body actually ran, so the first ORM call in the SSE generator hit a closed session. routes/snapshots.py now builds a sessionmaker via `_streaming_session_factory()` and hands it to `refresh_event_stream(session_factory)` which owns the session lifecycle inside its async body (try/finally close). (b) **App-level exception logger** in app.py — `@app.exception_handler(Exception)` catches every unhandled route error and emits a structured log via `workbench.unhandled` (`event=unhandled_route_exception`, method, path, exception_type, exception_message + traceback via .exception()) before returning the standard 500. This is the diagnostic surface the operator needs to identify what's actually failing on the 3 sync routes (Codex could not SSH the VM for journalctl, so the prior round-1 deploy gave us zero observability into the 500). (c) **Defensive degrade** in services/{dashboard,recommendations,backlog} — `_aggregate_nav`, `_aggregate_account_state`, `list_backlog` each wrap their session.execute() in try/SQLAlchemyError, log via service-specific logger (`workbench.dashboard|recommendations|backlog`) with `event=*_db_error` extra, session.rollback(), and return zeroed/empty state. Pages render their empty state instead of 500ing. Backlog mutations (POST/PATCH/DELETE) intentionally keep failing loud — silently dropping user input is worse than a 500 toast. Regression tests: tests/unit/test_db_degrade.py (4 tests using `_RaisingSession` mock raising OperationalError) + updated test_snapshots.py assertion that the SSE stream emits no error event. **Local verify**: backend pytest 128 passed + 2 skipped (124→128: +4 db_degrade) / ruff / mypy 89 files clean; frontend lint / tsc / vitest 79 clean. **What Codex needs to do**: after this push deploys, ask operator to capture `journalctl -u workbench-backend -n 200`. The new `workbench.unhandled` log lines will show the exact SQLAlchemy error class + message for each of the 3 sync routes — that pinpoints the actual root cause (missing migration? wrong DB url? table not created?). Defensive degrade lets the pages render empty in the meantime so L2 walkthrough can proceed.

session_notes.generator:
**2026-05-18 fixing-round 3** (接 Codex round-2 reverification — 3/4 routes 已恢复，剩 /api/snapshots GET 500 + /api/backlog POST 500 + 操作员仍无法供 journalctl)：本轮 4 个修复+1 个新诊断面。(A) **services/snapshots.list_snapshots 加 degrade**：round-2 只改了 SSE POST /refresh 没动 LIST handler，纯粹的 miss。同其它 3 service 一样 try/SQLAlchemyError → workbench.snapshots logger `event=snapshots_list_db_error` + rollback + 返 SnapshotListResponse(snapshots=[])。Snapshots 页能渲染空 state。(B) **routes/backlog._default_config 加 prod fallback** — 这是真正的 backlog POST 根因：生产从 wheel 装下来 routes/backlog.py 在 /srv/workbench/.../site-packages/ 下，Path(__file__).parents[4] 是 venv 不是 repo root；dev 时跑的 `git add backlog.json && git commit` 链在生产根本没 git working tree。新逻辑：if PROD_RELEASE_CURRENT(/srv/workbench/current).exists() → 写 PROD_BACKLOG_DIR(/var/lib/workbench/backlog/backlog.json，systemd ReadWritePaths 已授) + 用 _noop_git_runner(只 log 不 shell out)。**已记录限制**：prod backlog 改动不进 repo 的 git history；durability 靠 SQLite row + 每日 backup。B023 接 proper auditable persistence。(C) **services/backlog.create/update/delete_backlog 加 per-phase 结构化日志** — 新 _log_phase_failure(operation, entry_id, phase, exc) helper 在每个阶段(db_upsert_commit / json_dump / git_commit)包 try/raise；同时记 workbench.backlog logger `event=backlog_<op>_phase_error` extra={entry_id, phase, exception_type, exception_message}。即使有新失败模式 journalctl + error buffer 也能直接定位哪一步爆。(D) **新 observability/error_buffer.py** — collections.deque(maxlen=50) + Lock 守护，threadsafe；record_error/get_recent_errors/clear_recent_errors。typing_extensions.TypedDict（pydantic v2 在 py<3.12 强制）。(E) **新 GET /api/debug/recent-errors 路由 + RecentErrorsResponse schema**（auth-gated 同 require_authenticated_user）— 返 last 50 unhandled exceptions: {count, records:[{ts, method, path, exception_type, exception_message}]}。app.py global exception_handler 调 record_error() 同时 _unhandled_logger.exception()。这就替代了 journalctl 给 Codex — 现在 Codex curl /api/debug/recent-errors (用现有 authed session) 就能看到任何 500 的根因 class。**Regression tests**：test_db_degrade.py +1 snapshots（同 _RaisingSession mock），new test_backlog_prod_config.py 3 tests(prod paths via monkeypatch PROD_RELEASE_CURRENT/PROD_BACKLOG_DIR + dev paths fallback + _noop_git_runner logs event)，new test_error_buffer.py 3 tests(record round-trip + cap of 50 + global handler via TestClient inject /__test_failing__ route)。**踩到一个坑**：第一版 error_buffer 用 typing.TypedDict → pydantic v2 在 py3.11 报 PydanticUserError 要 typing_extensions.TypedDict。已切。**本地全绿**：backend pytest 135 + 2 skipped (128→135, +7=1 snapshots +3 backlog prod +3 error buffer) / ruff / mypy 93 文件 / frontend lint / tsc / vitest 79；api.ts 已 regen for new debug endpoint（+75 lines）。**Codex 部署后第一动作**：curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/debug/recent-errors → 看捕获到的 exception_type/message。/api/snapshots LIST 现在应返 200+空。/api/backlog POST：理想返 201 (prod fallback 把 JSON 写到 /var/lib/workbench/backlog/ 跳 git)；若仍 500，buffer 里会出现一条 backlog_create_phase_error 标 phase=db_upsert_commit/json_dump/git_commit 之一 — 直接告诉我们下一步动哪。

---

**2026-05-18 fixing-round 2** (接 Codex round-1 retest 后发现的 4 个生产 500)：F014-1 已解（authed Chrome session 通），但 round-1 fix 部署上去之后 Codex L2 真 VM 浏览器看到 4 个 authenticated route 直接 500：/api/dashboard / /api/recommendations/current / /api/snapshots/refresh (SSE) / /api/backlog (GET)。Codex 无法 SSH trade.guangai.ai:22 取 journalctl（被关闭），所以根因不明。本轮 3 个正交修复：(A) **SSE 根因明确**：routes/snapshots.py POST /refresh 改写 — 不再注入 SessionDep；改用 `_streaming_session_factory()` 返回 sessionmaker(bind=get_engine(),autoflush=False,autocommit=False,future=True)，传给 refresh_event_stream(session_factory)。services/snapshots.py 签名从 (session) 改成 (session_factory)，在 async generator 内部 `session = session_factory()` + try/except rollback + finally session.close()。**为什么**：FastAPI 同步 `get_session` generator dep 在 StreamingResponse 拿到 body 后就 teardown 关闭 session 了；之后 SSE async generator 真跑 `_persist_snapshot(session, ...)` 时 session 已 closed → ORM op 立刻爆。改用 factory 由 stream 自己拥有 session 生命周期，跨 generator-dep 边界。(B) **app.py 全局异常 logger**：`_unhandled_logger = logging.getLogger('workbench.unhandled')` + `@app.exception_handler(Exception)` async handler 用 `_unhandled_logger.exception()` 带 extra={event:'unhandled_route_exception', method, path, exception_type, exception_message} + 自动 traceback。返 JSONResponse(500, {detail:'Internal Server Error'})。**为什么**：当前生产 3 个同步路由 500 但 journalctl 看不到原因（操作员说 SSH 被关，无法读 log）；这个 handler 让下一次部署后任何 unhandled exception 都会在 journalctl 留下结构化 JSON 含 exception class + message + 堆栈。这就是 Codex 复验下一步索要的诊断面。(C) **3 个 service 防御性降级**：services/dashboard._aggregate_nav + services/recommendations._aggregate_account_state + services/backlog.list_backlog 全部加 try/SQLAlchemyError 包 session.execute()：catch → _logger.warning(extra={event:'<service>_<op>_db_error', exception_message}, exc_info=True) → session.rollback() → return 零/空 state。这样即便底层 DB 真的坏了，页面也能渲染空 state 而不是 500。**Backlog 写操作（POST/PATCH/DELETE）不降级**：写失败必须报错，silent drop 用户输入比 500 toast 更糟。3 个 service 文件里 `_logger = logging.getLogger(...)` 放在所有 from imports 之后（修 ruff E402；之前在中间会报 'Module level import not at top of file'）。**Regression tests**：tests/unit/test_db_degrade.py（4 tests，`_RaisingSession.execute` raise OperationalError mock；caplog.set_level WARNING 验 log 入；验各 fallback return 值 + session.rolled_back is True）。test_snapshots.py 加 `assert 'error' not in stages` 守 SSE 不再发 error 事件。**本地验收**：backend pytest 128 + 2 skipped（124→128）/ ruff / mypy 89 文件 clean；frontend lint / tsc / vitest 79 clean。**等 Codex 部署后**：要求 operator 给 `journalctl -u workbench-backend -n 200`。`workbench.unhandled` 行会显示 3 个同步路由实际的 SQLAlchemy 错误（migration 没跑？DB URL 错？table 不存？）。降级让页面 L2 可继续走流程。

---

**2026-05-18 fixing-round 1** (接 F014 first-round blocker)：(1) 修 4/5 Codex blockers (F014-1 authed Chrome session 需 operator)。**B022-F009-1 + F010-1：** services/dashboard._resolve_reports_dir + services/recommendations._resolve_runs_dir 加 prod-aware fallback chain（repo_root → /srv/workbench/current；runs prod 用 /var/lib/workbench/runs systemd ReadWritePaths 已授权）。工作流 workbench-deploy.yml Stage 步加 ship docs/test-reports + docs/specs 到 release/docs/。**根因 cross-cutting：** services/{dashboard,recommendations,docs} + routes/backlog 4 文件全用 `parents[3]`（解析到 workbench/ 不是 repo root，与 cli/bootstrap.py 已记的 parents[4] 不一致）→ 全改 parents[4]；这才是 reports_count=0 的真正根因。**B022-F014-DEV：** next.config.mjs rewrites 加全 10 个后端 prefix 含 bare + :path* 两形（dashboard/strategies/backtests/reports/recommendations/snapshots/backlog/docs + health + protected-test）。middleware.ts PUBLIC_PATH_PREFIXES 从 [/login,/api/auth,/api/health] 扩成 [/login,/api/]（后端自己 auth gate；middleware 的 redirect-to-login 只为 browser nav）。tests/e2e/protected-routes.spec.ts 加 attachDiagnostics() helper 监 page.on('response')(4xx/5xx on /api/* 非 /api/auth/) + page.on('console')(error type 非 hydration warnings) + page.on('pageerror')，新加 assertNoDiagnostics() 在每页 test 末尾。clicking-each-nav 不挂 diag（快速 nav 会 race，dev DB 未 migrate 会 500 — 这是 F014-DEV 之外的另一类问题，per-page test 已覆盖 API 监控）。新 tests/safety/dev-rewrites-cover-backend-api.spec.ts (11 regression) 静态 grep next.config 含必要 prefix。**B022-F001-SEC：** Next 14.2.33→14.2.35（latest 14.x patch）+ eslint-config-next 同步 + Playwright 1.48.2→1.55.1 + vitest 2.1.3→2.1.9。critical 1→0，high 6→4（剩余 next 14.x 生态级 advisories 只在 16.x 修，是 breaking change）。新
